## Summary

Describe the change and its motivation.

## Statistical behavior

Explain any change to likelihoods, durations, transitions, inference, or model selection.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `mypy src/gaussian_hsmm`
- [ ] `pytest --cov=gaussian_hsmm`
- [ ] Documentation/changelog updated

## Compatibility

Describe any public API or serialized-model implications.
